//: Runtime config for the AgilentMidacGlue assembly hosted in-process by the Rust Agilent IM-MS path via netcorehost. `dotnet build` regenerates this next to AgilentMidacGlue.dll; this checked-in copy documents the expected shape. Requires the .NET 8 runtime. MIDAC is x64 Windows only, so the hosting process must be x64 Windows at run time.
